name: Prompt Building & Loading
description: Constructs the full system prompt for each AI task by assembling project rules, MCP blocks, feature context, skill blocks, and task-specific instructions. Also builds Claude CLI command strings.

Managers/PromptBuilder.cs.content:
class PromptBuilder
  GetCliModelForTask(AgentTask task) -> string
  GetFriendlyModelName(string modelId) -> string
  GetCliModelForPhase(FeatureModePhase phase) -> string
  GetFeatureModeLogFilename(string? taskId = null) -> string
  BuildPromptWithImages(string basePrompt, List<string> imagePaths) -> string
  BuildClaudeCommand(bool skipPermissions, string? modelId = null, bool planMode = false, string? effortLevel = null) -> string
  BuildProcessStartInfo(string ps1FilePath, bool headless) -> ProcessStartInfo
  BuildFeatureModeContinuationPrompt(int iteration, int maxIterations, string taskId = "") -> string
  BuildFeatureModePlanConsolidationPrompt(int iteration, int maxIterations, string teamResults, string featureDescription) -> string
  BuildFeatureModeEvaluationPrompt(int iteration, int maxIterations, string featureDescription, string implementationResults) -> string

patterns: Layered prompt composition: system + project rules + feature context + skills
Markdown prompt files loaded from Prompts/ directory
